description: A secret is printed to job logs because the variable is unmasked or transformed before output.
body: Failure mode: a credential variable is not marked Masked, or a script echoes it (or a base64/derived form) so GitLab's masking cannot match it, leaving the secret visible in the job log to anyone with pipeline read access and in any log artifact. Detection signals: secret values appearing in job output; variables not flagged Masked; scripts that echo env or run with set -x over secret commands. Do not echo or transform secrets in job scripts. Safer fallback: mark variables Masked, avoid printing or transforming them, disable command tracing around secret use, and verify the value is absent from job logs.
